inline_comments.message: Won't this affect all the components, not just cm-container?  If the cm-container build is disabled, is this even necessary?

yeah, probably not required... Although there should be no impact to other active modules as the tag was primarily used for push/pull of nexus raw artifacts (plugins & mvn-phase-lib.sh; all the other modules builds local and pushes container to nexus3)

As mvn-phase-lib.sh (maintained under utils) could possibly evolve, will revert this to R10 to keep build script in sync.
